CustomField.description: Stable code like UA-001. Not an ExternalId - same CheckId appears across many runs and multiple times per run (one per affected component). Findings are always inserted, never upserted.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Stable identifier for the security check that produced this finding (e.g. UA-001). The same check ID appears across multiple scan runs. Not unique per record - use the record ID to key findings.
CustomField.label: Check Id
